TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Dowmung ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 264 buwan, 908 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 856 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 52 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 86%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dowmung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Dowmung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Dowmung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Dowmung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dowmung hya' ga Ibuh. tay mkyahu' na Dowmung hya' ga Tmunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *owmuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa iβuħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tmunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Dowmung ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 264 buwan, 908 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 856 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 52 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 86%, Amis 2%, Tayan 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dowmung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Dowmung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Dowmung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Dowmung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dowmung hya' ga Ibuh. tay mkyahu' na Dowmung hya' ga Tmunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *owmuŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa iβuħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *owmuŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tmunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
